description: Copy of Muḥammad's letter to Ḥunayy Ibn al-Akhṭab and the Jews of Khaybar and Maqnā. This is a variant of T-S 16.353 (PGPID 7491), identified by Alan Elbaum and Moshe Yagur. Written on parchment. Dating: Likely 10th or 11th century. The orthography is unusual and may suggest an early dating. On verso there is an unidentified text in Hebrew, possibly containing the phrases כי לו הגדולה and טובה וכשיר[ה].
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
